codeReview.summary: Implementation complete and correct. All four hard limits are properly enforced with comprehensive tests. Note: features.json shows status='pending' with empty workerSessionIds, but code was pre-committed in commit 8023fc4.

summary: PASS - All four hard limits (max tasks=100, max time=8h, max cost=$100, max failures=10) are correctly implemented with comprehensive tests (40 tests pass). The implementation uses proper Rust idioms with thread-safe SharedHardLimits wrapper. Integration with stopping_conditions.rs is properly wired. Minor tracking inconsistency: features.json was not updated after implementation.
